/usr/bin/gcc -O3 -march=native -mtune=native -fopenmp -O3 -DNDEBUG -rdynamic CMakeFiles/mmgs.dir/src/common/apptools.c.o CMakeFiles/mmgs.dir/src/mmgs/mmgs.c.o -o bin/mmgs_O3  -Wl,-rpath,/home/marco/Kratos/applications/MeshingApplication/custom_external_libraries/mmg/build/lib: lib/libmmgs.so.5.7.0 -lm
